stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 14, how does adding a stopway affect declared distances?

options.a: ASDA increases; TORA, TODA, and LDA remain unchanged.
options.b: LDA increases; ASDA, TORA, and TODA remain unchanged.
options.c: ASDA, TORA, and TODA increase; LDA remains unchanged.
options.d: ASDA and TORA increase; TODA and LDA remain unchanged.
